testcase.name: testScheduler
testcase.system-out: Str ===>>> 2026-02-04 11:59:01 INFO [main] Server started on port 8080 Str ===>>> 2026-02-04 11:59:05 INFO [http-nio-8080-exec-1] GET /api/health 200 Str ===>>> 2026-02-04
